en: Where has your beloved gone, O most beautiful among women? Where has your beloved turned, that we may seek him with you?
zh: 你這女子中極美麗的啊！ 你的良人到哪裡去了？ 你的良人轉到哪裡去了？ 讓我們與你去尋找他吧！

en: My beloved has gone down to his garden to the beds of spices, to graze in the gardens and to gather lilies.
zh: 我的良人下到自己的園中， 下到香花畦那裡， 在園內細賞， 採摘百合花。

en: I am my beloved's and my beloved is mine; he grazes among the lilies.
zh: 我屬我的良人，我的良人也屬我； 他在百合花中細賞。

en: You are beautiful as Tirzah, my love, lovely as Jerusalem, awesome as an army with banners.
zh: 我的佳偶啊！你美麗如得撒， 秀麗如耶路撒冷， 威武如展開旗幟的軍隊。

en: Turn away your eyes from me, for they overwhelm me- Your hair is like a flock of goats leaping down the slopes of Gilead.
zh: 請你轉眼不要看我， 因為你的眼使我心動！ 你的頭髮如同從基列山下來的山羊群。

en: Your teeth are like a flock of ewes that have come up from the washing; all of them bear twins; not one among them has lost its young.
zh: 你的牙齒像一群母羊， 剛剛洗淨上來那樣潔白整齊； 牠們成雙成對， 沒有單獨一隻的。

en: Your cheeks are like halves of a pomegranate behind your veil.
zh: 你的兩頰在面紗後面， 如同切開的石榴。

en: There are sixty queens and eighty concubines, and virgins without number.
zh: 雖有六十位王后，八十位妃嬪， 並有無數的宮女；

en: My dove, my perfect one, is the only one, the only one of her mother, pure to her who bore her. The young women saw her and called her blessed; the queens and concubines also, and they praised her.
zh: 唯獨我的鴿子，我的完全人，是獨一的； 是她母親獨一的寶貝， 是生養她者的寵兒。 眾女子看見她，都稱她為有福； 王后妃嬪見了，也都讚賞她，說：

en: "Who is this who looks down like the dawn, beautiful as the moon, bright as the sun, awesome as an army with banners?"
zh: “那出現如破曉的晨光， 美麗如月亮， 燦爛如日頭， 威武有如展開旗幟的軍隊的是誰呢？”

en: I went down to the nut orchard to look at the blossoms of the valley, to see whether the vines had budded, whether the pomegranates were in bloom.
zh: 我下到核桃園去， 看看谷中青綠的植物， 看看葡萄樹發芽沒有， 石榴樹開花沒有；

en: Before I was aware, my desire set me among the chariots of my kinsman, a prince.
zh: 不知不覺之間，我的心 把我置於我尊貴的民的車中。

en: Return, return, O Shulammite, return, return, that we may look upon you. Why should you look upon the Shulammite, as upon a dance before two armies?
zh: 回來吧，回來吧，書拉密女啊！ 回來吧，回來吧，讓我們看看你。 你們為甚麼要看書拉密女， 像看兩隊兵跳舞呢？
